context: Checks whether Reflect conditions target choice on cloud execution and OpenSpec availability instead of assuming local memory or hooks.

checklist.name: Environment surfaced first
checklist.description: The output explicitly identifies cloud execution, missing writable local memory, and unverified local hooks as constraints before choosing targets.

checklist.name: OpenSpec chosen for contract
checklist.description: The independent-reviewer requirement is routed to OpenSpec change/spec guidance or OpenSpec verification workflow because the repo already uses OpenSpec.

checklist.name: Cloud-safe persistence
checklist.description: The output prefers repo-tracked files, PR description/comment, issue, or proposal artifacts over local-only memory for cloud execution.

checklist.name: Hook conditionality
checklist.description: The output proposes hooks or lifecycle gates only as conditional follow-up when they can be installed and verified, not as assumed available cloud state.

checklist.name: CI workflow considered
checklist.description: The output considers CI/local gates or workflow checks as a cloud-compatible enforcement surface for repeated missed verification.

checklist.name: Fallback path
checklist.description: The output gives a fallback if OpenSpec CLI or repo write access is unavailable, such as a proposal-only report with exact patch targets.

checklist.name: Target rationale
checklist.description: Each chosen target explains why it beats local memory, plain docs, hooks, or specs in this environment.

checklist.name: Validation named
checklist.description: The output names appropriate validation such as openspec validate, CI check, hook dry-run, or reviewer pass depending on target.

checklist.name: No false local claims
checklist.description: The output does not claim to update local memory, install hooks, or verify workstation-only state from the cloud run.
